# Husnain Ahmed

> Full Stack Developer based in Rome, Italy. Skilled in Laravel, Flutter, and diverse tech stacks. Passionate about end-to-end solutions.

Rome, Italy

- Coordinating with developer team on code modules, debugging, and testing

Karachi, Pakistan

- Web projects: newalkebulanschools.com, islamabadproperty.pk, gradeyourschool.at

## Personal Projects
Side projects designed, built, and shipped solo — from idea to production.

### TataFacile (2026)
A platform connecting Italian families with document-verified babysitters. Features profile filtering, in-app messaging, video calls, and secure payments. Currently serves 10,000+ families across Italy with a 4.9/5 rating from 2,340+ reviews. Featured in Vanity Fair, Corriere.it, and Repubblica.
- Stack: Laravel, Flutter, MySQL
- Web: https://tatafacile.eu/
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/gb/app/tatafacile/id6759669595
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=tatafacile.eu

### AvvisamiOnline (2026)
Smart QR sticker service that lets finders contact the owner instantly while keeping the owner's phone number 100% private.
- Stack: Laravel, MySQL
- Web: https://avvisamionline.it/

### VehicleVinInfo (2026)
Free 17-digit VIN decoder paired with full vehicle history reports — accidents, title brands, recalls, theft records, ownership history, and auction listings, all in one report.
- Stack: Laravel, MySQL
- Web: https://www.vehiclevininfo.com/

### UTC Clock (2021)
World clock app for Android that keeps users synced to global time zones — built for frequent travelers and international teams.
- Stack: Flutter, Dart
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.utc.clock.utc_clock
